title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at MCX

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at MCX
jsonLd.description:
MCX is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!
